title: Duck Tagine with Richly Roasted Egyptian Vegetables
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with richly roasted vegetables, slow-cooked duck, and Egyptian spices.
instructions: Season the duck with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the duck to a plate and set aside.
Add the chopped onions to the pot and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, carrots, potatoes, eggplant, and zucchini to the pot.
Stir in the Ras el hanout, cumin, and coriander.
Return the duck to the pot, breast side up.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Reduce the oven temperature to 300°F (150°C) and continue baking for an additional 45 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the duck with the roasted vegetables and sauce spooned over the top.
